pkgmetadata.longdescription: [[pre-commit.ci status](httpsresults.pre-commit.cibadgegithubasottiletypes-allmaster.svg)](httpsresults.pre-commit.cilatestgithubasottiletypes-allmaster)types-allA shim for the typeshed changes in mypy 0.900 installationpip install types-all why--install-types is annoying, this installs all the things in [typeshed]error Library stubs not installed for toml (or incompatible with Python 3.8)(for pre-commit, use something like this)yaml- repo httpsgithub.compre-commitmirrors-mypy rev v0.902 hooks - id mypy additional_dependencies [types-all][typeshed] httpsgithub.compythontypeshed
